name: Chocolate Chunk Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Combine first four ingredients in a medium bowl. Stir in mayonnaise until well mixed.
Shape the dough into two tablespoonfuls of balls and place them on an ungreased cookie sheet, spacing about 2 inches apart.
Bake for about 12 minutes.
Cool.
